nodes.label: Send to Cable
nodes.description: Broadcasts value to all other global_cable nodes on the same Connection via GlobalRoutingManager

nodes.label: Receive from Cable
nodes.description: Receives values sent by other global_cable nodes on the same cable

nodes.label: Recursion Guard
nodes.description: Prevents feedback loop -- a node does not forward values it just sent

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Forwards received cable value to connected parameter targets
